company_raw: Peoples Natural Gas Co. LLC and Peoples Gas Co. LLC
source_note: Management & Operations Audit of Aqua Pennsylvania, Peoples Natural Gas Co. LLC and Peoples Gas Co. LLC (joint), PA PUC Bureau of Audits; PUC publication 2021-05-06, Dockets D-2020-3018771/3018773/3018774; 47 recommendations (combined). Seeded for the Peoples gas companies (industry=gas); Aqua is water and out of scope but the audit is published as one report. Findings parsed verbatim from the Exhibit I-2 Summary of Recommendations. PDF: puc.pa.gov/pcdocs/1702687.pdf.
